examples: He caught her arm in a subconscious attempt to detain her.
Millson stood up. "Thank you. We won't detain you any further, Mrs. Stebbing."
It is against the law to detain you against your will for any length of time.
Instead, American forces are either killing them or letting less squeamish allies detain them.
Investigating Judge Judge Pablo Ruz ruled Sunday there was sufficient evidence to unconditionally detain both men.
